query:
You are working on the Kotlin/kotlinx-datetime repository.
The codebase is at version 0.6 (commit: cc8121a6).

## Issue to Resolve

Potential improvements and input preservation in parsing and formatting error messages
I've set the experiment "I have a system with externally-supplied input that I'm parsing" in order to see how debuggable the end system is.

Here are a few potential improvements that can be made:

1) `Inconsistent hour and the AM/PM marker` correctly shows an unexpected component, but it would be nice to see the full input to understand the source of the problem.

E.g. for `Inconsistent hour and the AM/PM marker: hour is 23, but the AM/PM marker is AM` `23` is nice, but for observability purposes, I would like to see the whole input.


2) `Position X: Expected One of` probably should be `Position 0: Expected one of`


3) The same as for `1` it goes for validation of components done in constructors: `LocalDate`, `LocalDateTime`, `LocalTime`, `UtcOffset`

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `core/common/src/LocalDate.kt`
- `core/common/src/LocalDateTime.kt`
- `core/common/src/LocalTime.kt`
- `core/common/src/UtcOffset.kt`
- `core/common/src/format/DateTimeComponents.kt`
- `core/common/src/format/DateTimeFormat.kt`
- `core/common/src/internal/format/FieldFormatDirective.kt`
- `core/common/src/internal/format/FormatStructure.kt`
- `core/common/src/internal/format/parser/ParserOperation.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

## Important Evaluation Notes

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

content.thinking:
Let me understand the issue:

1. When parsing errors occur, the error messages should include the full input string for better debuggability
2. There's a typo in error messages: "Expected One of" should be "Expected one of" (lowercase 'o')
3. Validation errors in constructors (LocalDate, LocalDateTime, LocalTime, UtcOffset) should also include the input for better observability

Let me start by exploring the relevant files to understand the current error handling.

content.text: I'll analyze this issue and implement fixes for the error message improvements. Let me start by exploring the relevant files.

1тЖТ/*
  2тЖТ * Copyright 2019-2023 JetBrains s.r.o. and contributors.
  3тЖТ * Use of this source code is governed by the Apache 2.0 License that can be found in the LICENSE.txt file.
  4тЖТ */
  5тЖТ
  6тЖТpackage kotlinx.datetime.format
  7тЖТ
  8тЖТimport kotlinx.datetime.*
  9тЖТimport kotlinx.datetime.DayOfWeek
 10тЖТimport kotlinx.datetime.internal.*
 11тЖТimport kotlinx.datetime.internal.format.*
 12тЖТimport kotlinx.datetime.internal.format.parser.Copyable
 13тЖТimport kotlinx.datetime.internal.safeMultiply
 14тЖТimport kotlin.reflect.*
 15тЖТ
 16тЖТ/**
 17тЖТ * A collection of date-time fields, used specifically for parsing and formatting.
 18тЖТ *
 19тЖТ * Its main purpose is to provide support for complex date-time formats that don't correspond to any of the standard
 20тЖТ * entities in the library. For example, a format that includes only the month and the day of the month, but not the
 21тЖТ * year, can not be represented and parsed as a [LocalDate], but it is valid for a [DateTimeComponents].
 22тЖТ *
 23тЖТ * Example:
 24тЖТ * ```
 25тЖТ * val input = "2020-03-16T23:59:59.999999999+03:00"
 26тЖТ * val components = DateTimeComponents.Formats.ISO_DATE_TIME_OFFSET.parse(input)
 27тЖТ * val localDateTime = components.toLocalDateTime() // LocalDateTime(2020, 3, 16, 23, 59, 59, 999_999_999)
 28тЖТ * val instant = components.toInstantUsingOffset() // Instant.parse("2020-03-16T20:59:59.999999999Z")
 29тЖТ * val offset = components.toUtcOffset() // UtcOffset(hours = 3)
 30тЖТ * ```
 31тЖТ *
 32тЖТ * Another purpose is to support parsing and formatting data with out-of-bounds values. For example, parsing
 33тЖТ * `23:59:60` as a [LocalTime] is not possible, but it is possible to parse it as a [DateTimeComponents], adjust the value by
 34тЖТ * setting [second] to `59`, and then convert it to a [LocalTime] via [toLocalTime].
 35тЖТ *
 36тЖТ * Example:
 37тЖТ * ```
 38тЖТ * val input = "23:59:60"
 39тЖТ * val extraDay: Boolean
 40тЖТ * val time = DateTimeComponents.Format {
 41тЖТ *   time(LocalTime.Formats.ISO)
 42тЖТ * }.parse(input).apply {
 43тЖТ *   if (hour == 23 && minute == 59 && second == 60) {
 44тЖТ *     hour = 0; minute = 0; second = 0; extraDay = true
 45тЖТ *   } else {
 46тЖТ *     extraDay = false
 47тЖТ *   }
 48тЖТ * }.toLocalTime()
 49тЖТ * ```
 50тЖТ *
 51тЖТ * Because this class has limited applications, constructing it directly is not possible.
 52тЖТ * For formatting, use the [format] overload that accepts a lambda with a [DateTimeComponents] receiver.
 53тЖТ *
 54тЖТ * Example:
 55тЖТ * ```
 56тЖТ * // Mon, 16 Mar 2020 23:59:59 +0300
 57тЖТ * DateTimeComponents.Formats.RFC_1123.format {
 58тЖТ *    setDateTimeOffset(LocalDateTime(2020, 3, 16, 23, 59, 59, 999_999_999))
 59тЖТ *    setDateTimeOffset(UtcOffset(hours = 3))
 60тЖТ * }
 61тЖТ * ```
 62тЖТ *
 63тЖТ * Accessing the fields of this class is not thread-safe.
 64тЖТ * Make sure to apply proper synchronization if you are using a single instance from multiple threads.
 65тЖТ */
 66тЖТpublic class DateTimeComponents internal constructor(internal val contents: DateTimeComponentsContents = DateTimeComponentsContents()) {
 67тЖТ    public companion object {
 68тЖТ        /**
 69тЖТ         * Creates a [DateTimeFormat] for [DateTimeComponents] values using [DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDateTimeComponents].
 70тЖТ         *
 71тЖТ         * There is a collection of predefined formats in [DateTimeComponents.Formats].
 72тЖТ         */
 73тЖТ        @Suppress("FunctionName")
 74тЖТ        public fun Format(block: DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDateTimeComponents.() -> Unit): DateTimeFormat<DateTimeComponents> {
 75тЖТ            val builder = DateTimeComponentsFormat.Builder(AppendableFormatStructure())
 76тЖТ            block(builder)
 77тЖТ            return DateTimeComponentsFormat(builder.build())
 78тЖТ        }
 79тЖТ    }
 80тЖТ
 81тЖТ    /**
 82тЖТ     * A collection of formats for parsing and formatting [DateTimeComponents] values.
 83тЖТ     *
 84тЖТ     * If predefined formats are not sufficient, use [DateTimeComponents.Format] to create a custom
 85тЖТ     * [kotlinx.datetime.format.DateTimeFormat] for [DateTimeComponents] values.
 86тЖТ     */
 87тЖТ    public object Formats {
 88тЖТ
 89тЖТ        /**
 90тЖТ         * ISO 8601 extended format for dates and times with UTC offset.
 91тЖТ         *
 92тЖТ         * For specifying the time zone offset, the format uses the [UtcOffset.Formats.ISO] format, except that during
 93тЖТ         * parsing, specifying the minutes is optional.
 94тЖТ         *
 95тЖТ         * This format differs from [LocalTime.Formats.ISO] in its time part in that
 96тЖТ         * specifying the seconds is *not* optional.
 97тЖТ         *
 98тЖТ         * Examples of instants in the ISO 8601 format:
 99тЖТ         * - `2020-08-30T18:43:00Z`
100тЖТ         * - `2020-08-30T18:43:00.50Z`
101тЖТ         * - `2020-08-30T18:43:00.123456789Z`
102тЖТ         * - `2020-08-30T18:40:00+03:00`
103тЖТ         * - `2020-08-30T18:40:00+03:30:20`
104тЖТ         * * `2020-01-01T23:59:59.123456789+01`
105тЖТ         * * `+12020-01-31T23:59:59Z`
106тЖТ         *
107тЖТ         * This format uses the local date, local time, and UTC offset fields of [DateTimeComponents].
108тЖТ         *
109тЖТ         * See ISO-8601-1:2019, 5.4.2.1b), excluding the format without the offset.
110тЖТ         *
111тЖТ         * Guaranteed to parse all strings that [Instant.toString] produces.
112тЖТ         */
113тЖТ        public val ISO_DATE_TIME_OFFSET: DateTimeFormat<DateTimeComponents> = Format {
114тЖТ            date(ISO_DATE)
115тЖТ            alternativeParsing({
116тЖТ                char('t')
117тЖТ            }) {
118тЖТ                char('T')
119тЖТ            }
120тЖТ            hour()
121тЖТ            char(':')
122тЖТ            minute()
123тЖТ            char(':')
124тЖТ            second()
125тЖТ            optional {
126тЖТ                char('.')
127тЖТ                secondFraction(1, 9)
128тЖТ            }
129тЖТ            alternativeParsing({
130тЖТ                offsetHours()
131тЖТ            }) {
132тЖТ                offset(UtcOffset.Formats.ISO)
133тЖТ            }
134тЖТ        }
135тЖТ
136тЖТ        /**
137тЖТ         * RFC 1123 format for dates and times with UTC offset.
138тЖТ         *
139тЖТ         * Examples of valid strings:
140тЖТ         * * `Mon, 30 Jun 2008 11:05:30 GMT`
141тЖТ         * * `Mon, 30 Jun 2008 11:05:30 -0300`
142тЖТ         * * `30 Jun 2008 11:05:30 UT`
143тЖТ         *
144тЖТ         * North American and military time zone abbreviations are not supported.
145тЖТ         */
146тЖТ        public val RFC_1123: DateTimeFormat<DateTimeComponents> = Format {
147тЖТ            alternativeParsing({
148тЖТ                // the day of week may be missing
149тЖТ            }) {
150тЖТ                dayOfWeek(DayOfWeekNames.ENGLISH_ABBREVIATED)
151тЖТ                chars(", ")
152тЖТ            }
153тЖТ            dayOfMonth(Padding.NONE)
154тЖТ            char(' ')
155тЖТ            monthName(MonthNames.ENGLISH_ABBREVIATED)
156тЖТ            char(' ')
157тЖТ            year()
158тЖТ            char(' ')
159тЖТ            hour()
160тЖТ            char(':')
161тЖТ            minute()
162тЖТ            optional {
163тЖТ                char(':')
164тЖТ                second()
165тЖТ            }
166тЖТ            chars(" ")
167тЖТ            alternativeParsing({
168тЖТ                chars("UT")
169тЖТ            }, {
170тЖТ                chars("Z")
171тЖТ            }) {
172тЖТ                optional("GMT") {
173тЖТ                    offset(UtcOffset.Formats.FOUR_DIGITS)
174тЖТ                }
175тЖТ            }
176тЖТ        }
177тЖТ    }
178тЖТ
179тЖТ    /**
180тЖТ     * Writes the contents of the specified [localTime] to this [DateTimeComponents].
181тЖТ     * The [localTime] is written to the [hour], [hourOfAmPm], [amPm], [minute], [second] and [nanosecond] fields.
182тЖТ     *
183тЖТ     * If any of the fields are already set, they will be overwritten.
184тЖТ     */
185тЖТ    public fun setTime(localTime: LocalTime) {
186тЖТ        contents.time.populateFrom(localTime)
187тЖТ    }
188тЖТ
189тЖТ    /**
190тЖТ     * Writes the contents of the specified [localDate] to this [DateTimeComponents].
191тЖТ     * The [localDate] is written to the [year], [monthNumber], [dayOfMonth], and [dayOfWeek] fields.
192тЖТ     *
193тЖТ     * If any of the fields are already set, they will be overwritten.
194тЖТ     */
195тЖТ    public fun setDate(localDate: LocalDate) {
196тЖТ        contents.date.populateFrom(localDate)
197тЖТ    }
198тЖТ
199тЖТ    /**
200тЖТ     * Writes the contents of the specified [localDateTime] to this [DateTimeComponents].
201тЖТ     * The [localDateTime] is written to the
202тЖТ     * [year], [monthNumber], [dayOfMonth], [dayOfWeek],
203тЖТ     * [hour], [hourOfAmPm], [amPm], [minute], [second] and [nanosecond] fields.
204тЖТ     *
205тЖТ     * If any of the fields are already set, they will be overwritten.
206тЖТ     */
207тЖТ    public fun setDateTime(localDateTime: LocalDateTime) {
208тЖТ        contents.date.populateFrom(localDateTime.date)
209тЖТ        contents.time.populateFrom(localDateTime.time)
210тЖТ    }
211тЖТ
212тЖТ    /**
213тЖТ     * Writes the contents of the specified [utcOffset] to this [DateTimeComponents].
214тЖТ     * The [utcOffset] is written to the [offsetHours], [offsetMinutesOfHour], [offsetSecondsOfMinute], and
215тЖТ     * [offsetIsNegative] fields.
216тЖТ     *
217тЖТ     * If any of the fields are already set, they will be overwritten.
218тЖТ     */
219тЖТ    public fun setOffset(utcOffset: UtcOffset) {
220тЖТ        contents.offset.populateFrom(utcOffset)
221тЖТ    }
222тЖТ
223тЖТ    /**
224тЖТ     * Writes the contents of the specified [instant] to this [DateTimeComponents].
225тЖТ     *
226тЖТ     * This method is almost always equivalent to the following code:
227тЖТ     * ```
228тЖТ     * setDateTime(instant.toLocalDateTime(offset))
229тЖТ     * setOffset(utcOffset)
230тЖТ     * ```
231тЖТ     * However, this also works for instants that are too large to be represented as a [LocalDateTime].
232тЖТ     *
233тЖТ     * If any of the fields are already set, they will be overwritten.
234тЖТ     */
235тЖТ    public fun setDateTimeOffset(instant: Instant, utcOffset: UtcOffset) {
236тЖТ        val smallerInstant = Instant.fromEpochSeconds(
237тЖТ            instant.epochSeconds % SECONDS_PER_10000_YEARS, instant.nanosecondsOfSecond
238тЖТ        )
239тЖТ        setDateTime(smallerInstant.toLocalDateTime(utcOffset))
240тЖТ        setOffset(utcOffset)
241тЖТ        year = year!! + ((instant.epochSeconds / SECONDS_PER_10000_YEARS) * 10000).toInt()
242тЖТ    }
243тЖТ
244тЖТ    /**
245тЖТ     * Writes the contents of the specified [localDateTime] and [utcOffset] to this [DateTimeComponents].
246тЖТ     *
247тЖТ     * A shortcut for calling [setDateTime] and [setOffset] separately.
248тЖТ     *
249тЖТ     * If [localDateTime] is obtained from an [Instant] using [LocalDateTime.toInstant], it is recommended to use
250тЖТ     * [setDateTimeOffset] that accepts an [Instant] directly.
251тЖТ     */
252тЖТ    public fun setDateTimeOffset(localDateTime: LocalDateTime, utcOffset: UtcOffset) {
253тЖТ        setDateTime(localDateTime)
254тЖТ        setOffset(utcOffset)
255тЖТ    }
256тЖТ
257тЖТ    /** The year component of the date. */
258тЖТ    public var year: Int? by contents.date::year
259тЖТ
260тЖТ    /**
261тЖТ     * The number-of-month (1..12) component of the date.
262тЖТ     * @throws IllegalArgumentException during assignment if the value is outside the `0..99` range.
263тЖТ     */
264тЖТ    public var monthNumber: Int? by TwoDigitNumber(contents.date::monthNumber)
265тЖТ
266тЖТ    /**
267тЖТ     * The month ([Month]) component of the date.
268тЖТ     * @throws IllegalArgumentException during getting if [monthNumber] is outside the `1..12` range.
269тЖТ     */
270тЖТ    public var month: Month?
271тЖТ        get() = monthNumber?.let { Month(it) }
272тЖТ        set(value) {
273тЖТ            monthNumber = value?.number
274тЖТ        }
275тЖТ
276тЖТ    /**
277тЖТ     * The day-of-month component of the date.
278тЖТ     * @throws IllegalArgumentException during assignment if the value is outside the `0..99` range.
279тЖТ     */
280тЖТ    public var dayOfMonth: Int? by TwoDigitNumber(contents.date::dayOfMonth)
281тЖТ
282тЖТ    /** The day-of-week component of the date. */
283тЖТ    public var dayOfWeek: DayOfWeek?
284тЖТ        get() = contents.date.isoDayOfWeek?.let { DayOfWeek(it) }
285тЖТ        set(value) {
286тЖТ            contents.date.isoDayOfWeek = value?.isoDayNumber
287тЖТ        }
288тЖТ    // /** Returns the day-of-year component of the date. */
289тЖТ    // public var dayOfYear: Int
290тЖТ
291тЖТ    /**
292тЖТ     * The hour-of-day (0..23) time component.
293тЖТ     * @throws IllegalArgumentException during assignment if the value is outside the `0..99` range.
294тЖТ     */
295тЖТ    public var hour: Int? by TwoDigitNumber(contents.time::hour)
296тЖТ
297тЖТ    /**
298тЖТ     * The 12-hour (1..12) time component.
299тЖТ     * @throws IllegalArgumentException during assignment if the value is outside the `0..99` range.
300тЖТ     * @see amPm
301тЖТ     */
302тЖТ    public var hourOfAmPm: Int? by TwoDigitNumber(contents.time::hourOfAmPm)
303тЖТ
304тЖТ    /**
305тЖТ     * The AM/PM state of the time component.
306тЖТ     * @see hourOfAmPm
307тЖТ     */
308тЖТ    public var amPm: AmPmMarker? by contents.time::amPm
309тЖТ
310тЖТ    /**
311тЖТ     * The minute-of-hour component.
312тЖТ     * @throws IllegalArgumentException during assignment if the value is outside the `0..99` range.
313тЖТ     */
314тЖТ    public var minute: Int? by TwoDigitNumber(contents.time::minute)
315тЖТ
316тЖТ    /**
317тЖТ     * The second-of-minute component.
318тЖТ     * @throws IllegalArgumentException during assignment if the value is outside the `0..99` range.
319тЖТ     */
320тЖТ    public var second: Int? by TwoDigitNumber(contents.time::second)
321тЖТ
322тЖТ    /**
323тЖТ     * The nanosecond-of-second component.
324тЖТ     * @throws IllegalArgumentException during assignment if the value is outside the `0..999_999_999` range.
325тЖТ     */
326тЖТ    public var nanosecond: Int?
327тЖТ        get() = contents.time.nanosecond
328тЖТ        set(value) {
329тЖТ            require(value == null || value in 0..999_999_999) {
330тЖТ                "Nanosecond must be in the range [0, 999_999_999]."
331тЖТ            }
332тЖТ            contents.time.nanosecond = value
333тЖТ        }
334тЖТ
335тЖТ    /** True if the offset is negative. */
336тЖТ    public var offsetIsNegative: Boolean? by contents.offset::isNegative
337тЖТ
338тЖТ    /**
339тЖТ     * The total amount of full hours in the UTC offset, in the range [0; 18].
340тЖТ     * @throws IllegalArgumentException during assignment if the value is outside the `0..99` range.
341тЖТ     */
342тЖТ    public var offsetHours: Int? by TwoDigitNumber(contents.offset::totalHoursAbs)
343тЖТ
344тЖТ    /**
345тЖТ     * The amount of minutes that don't add to a whole hour in the UTC offset, in the range [0; 59].
346тЖТ     * @throws IllegalArgumentException during assignment if the value is outside the `0..99` range.
347тЖТ     */
348тЖТ    public var offsetMinutesOfHour: Int? by TwoDigitNumber(contents.offset::minutesOfHour)
349тЖТ
350тЖТ    /**
351тЖТ     * The amount of seconds that don't add to a whole minute in the UTC offset, in the range [0; 59].
352тЖТ     * @throws IllegalArgumentException during assignment if the value is outside the `0..99` range.
353тЖТ     */
354тЖТ    public var offsetSecondsOfMinute: Int? by TwoDigitNumber(contents.offset::secondsOfMinute)
355тЖТ
356тЖТ    /** The timezone identifier, for example, "Europe/Berlin". */
357тЖТ    public var timeZoneId: String? by contents::timeZoneId
358тЖТ
359тЖТ    /**
360тЖТ     * Builds a [UtcOffset] from the fields in this [DateTimeComponents].
361тЖТ     *
362тЖТ     * This method uses the following fields:
363тЖТ     * * [offsetIsNegative] (default value is `false`)
364тЖТ     * * [offsetHours] (default value is 0)
365тЖТ     * * [offsetMinutesOfHour] (default value is 0)
366тЖТ     * * [offsetSecondsOfMinute] (default value is 0)
367тЖТ     *
368тЖТ     * @throws IllegalArgumentException if any of the fields has an out-of-range value.
369тЖТ     */
370тЖТ    public fun toUtcOffset(): UtcOffset = contents.offset.toUtcOffset()
371тЖТ
372тЖТ    /**
373тЖТ     * Builds a [LocalDate] from the fields in this [DateTimeComponents].
374тЖТ     *
375тЖТ     * This method uses the following fields:
376тЖТ     * * [year]
377тЖТ     * * [monthNumber]
378тЖТ     * * [dayOfMonth]
379тЖТ     *
380тЖТ     * Also, [dayOfWeek] is checked for consistency with the other fields.
381тЖТ     *
382тЖТ     * @throws IllegalArgumentException if any of the fields is missing or invalid.
383тЖТ     */
384тЖТ    public fun toLocalDate(): LocalDate = contents.date.toLocalDate()
385тЖТ
386тЖТ    /**
387тЖТ     * Builds a [LocalTime] from the fields in this [DateTimeComponents].
388тЖТ     *
389тЖТ     * This method uses the following fields:
390тЖТ     * * [hour], [hourOfAmPm], and [amPm]
391тЖТ     * * [minute]
392тЖТ     * * [second] (default value is 0)
393тЖТ     * * [nanosecond] (default value is 0)
394тЖТ     *
395тЖТ     * @throws IllegalArgumentException if hours or minutes are not present, if any of the fields are invalid, or
396тЖТ     * [hourOfAmPm] and [amPm] are inconsistent with [hour].
397тЖТ     */
398тЖТ    public fun toLocalTime(): LocalTime = contents.time.toLocalTime()
399тЖТ
400тЖТ    /**
401тЖТ     * Builds a [LocalDateTime] from the fields in this [DateTimeComponents].
402тЖТ     *
403тЖТ     * This method uses the following fields:
404тЖТ     * * [year]
405тЖТ     * * [monthNumber]
406тЖТ     * * [dayOfMonth]
407тЖТ     * * [hour], [hourOfAmPm], and [amPm]
408тЖТ     * * [minute]
409тЖТ     * * [second] (default value is 0)
410тЖТ     * * [nanosecond] (default value is 0)
411тЖТ     *
412тЖТ     * Also, [dayOfWeek] is checked for consistency with the other fields.
413тЖТ     *
414тЖТ     * @throws IllegalArgumentException if any of the required fields are not present,
415тЖТ     * any of the fields are invalid, or there's inconsistency.
416тЖТ     *
417тЖТ     * @see toLocalDate
418тЖТ     * @see toLocalTime
419тЖТ     */
420тЖТ    public fun toLocalDateTime(): LocalDateTime = toLocalDate().atTime(toLocalTime())
421тЖТ
422тЖТ    /**
423тЖТ     * Builds an [Instant] from the fields in this [DateTimeComponents].
424тЖТ     *
425тЖТ     * Uses the fields required for [toLocalDateTime] and [toUtcOffset].
426тЖТ     *
427тЖТ     * Almost always equivalent to `toLocalDateTime().toInstant(toUtcOffset())`, but also accounts for cases when
428тЖТ     * the year is outside the range representable by [LocalDate] but not outside the range representable by [Instant].
429тЖТ     *
430тЖТ     * @throws IllegalArgumentException if any of the required fields are not present, out-of-range, or inconsistent
431тЖТ     * with one another.
432тЖТ     */
433тЖТ    public fun toInstantUsingOffset(): Instant {
434тЖТ        val offset = toUtcOffset()
435тЖТ        val time = toLocalTime()
436тЖТ        val truncatedDate = contents.date.copy()
437тЖТ        /**
438тЖТ         * 10_000 is a number that is both
439тЖТ         * * guaranteed to be representable as the number of years in a [LocalDate],
440тЖТ         * * and is a multiple of 400, which is the number of years in a leap cycle, which means that taking the
441тЖТ         *   remainder of the year after dividing by 40_000 will not change the leap year status of the year.
442тЖТ         */
443тЖТ        truncatedDate.year = requireParsedField(truncatedDate.year, "year") % 10_000
444тЖТ        val totalSeconds = try {
445тЖТ            val secDelta = safeMultiply((year!! / 10_000).toLong(), SECONDS_PER_10000_YEARS)
446тЖТ            val epochDays = truncatedDate.toLocalDate().toEpochDays().toLong()
447тЖТ            safeAdd(secDelta, epochDays * SECONDS_PER_DAY + time.toSecondOfDay() - offset.totalSeconds)
448тЖТ        } catch (e: ArithmeticException) {
449тЖТ            throw DateTimeFormatException("The parsed date is outside the range representable by Instant", e)
450тЖТ        }
451тЖТ        if (totalSeconds < Instant.MIN.epochSeconds || totalSeconds > Instant.MAX.epochSeconds)
452тЖТ            throw DateTimeFormatException("The parsed date is outside the range representable by Instant")
453тЖТ        return Instant.fromEpochSeconds(totalSeconds, nanosecond ?: 0)
454тЖТ    }
455тЖТ}
456тЖТ
457тЖТ/**
458тЖТ * Uses this format to format an unstructured [DateTimeComponents].
459тЖТ *
460тЖТ * [block] is called on an initially-empty [DateTimeComponents] before formatting.
461тЖТ *
462тЖТ * Example:
463тЖТ * ```
464тЖТ * // Mon, 16 Mar 2020 23:59:59 +0300
465тЖТ * DateTimeComponents.Formats.RFC_1123.format {
466тЖТ *    setDateTime(LocalDateTime(2020, 3, 16, 23, 59, 59, 999_999_999))
467тЖТ *    setOffset(UtcOffset(hours = 3))
468тЖТ * }
469тЖТ * ```
470тЖТ *
471тЖТ * @throws IllegalStateException if some values needed for the format are not present or can not be formatted:
472тЖТ * for example, trying to format [DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate.monthName] using a [DateTimeComponents.monthNumber]
473тЖТ * value of 20.
474тЖТ */
475тЖТpublic fun DateTimeFormat<DateTimeComponents>.format(block: DateTimeComponents.() -> Unit): String =
476тЖТ    format(DateTimeComponents().apply { block() })
477тЖТ
478тЖТ/**
479тЖТ * Parses a [DateTimeComponents] from [input] using the given format.
480тЖТ * Equivalent to calling [DateTimeFormat.parse] on [format] with [input].
481тЖТ *
482тЖТ * [DateTimeComponents] does not perform any validation, so even invalid values may be parsed successfully if the string pattern
483тЖТ * matches.
484тЖТ *
485тЖТ * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the text does not match the format.
486тЖТ */
487тЖТpublic fun DateTimeComponents.Companion.parse(
488тЖТ    input: CharSequence,
489тЖТ    format: DateTimeFormat<DateTimeComponents>
490тЖТ): DateTimeComponents =
491тЖТ    format.parse(input)
492тЖТ
493тЖТinternal class DateTimeComponentsContents internal constructor(
494тЖТ    val date: IncompleteLocalDate = IncompleteLocalDate(),
495тЖТ    val time: IncompleteLocalTime = IncompleteLocalTime(),
496тЖТ    val offset: IncompleteUtcOffset = IncompleteUtcOffset(),
497тЖТ    var timeZoneId: String? = null,
498тЖТ) : DateFieldContainer by date, TimeFieldContainer by time, UtcOffsetFieldContainer by offset,
499тЖТ    DateTimeFieldContainer, Copyable<DateTimeComponentsContents> {
500тЖТ    override fun copy(): DateTimeComponentsContents =
501тЖТ        DateTimeComponentsContents(date.copy(), time.copy(), offset.copy(), timeZoneId)
502тЖТ
503тЖТ    override fun equals(other: Any?): Boolean =
504тЖТ        other is DateTimeComponentsContents && other.date == date && other.time == time &&
505тЖТ            other.offset == offset && other.timeZoneId == timeZoneId
506тЖТ
507тЖТ    override fun hashCode(): Int =
508тЖТ        date.hashCode() xor time.hashCode() xor offset.hashCode() xor (timeZoneId?.hashCode() ?: 0)
509тЖТ}
510тЖТ
511тЖТinternal val timeZoneField = GenericFieldSpec(PropertyAccessor(DateTimeComponentsContents::timeZoneId))
512тЖТ
513тЖТinternal class TimeZoneIdDirective(private val knownZones: Set<String>) :
514тЖТ    StringFieldFormatDirective<DateTimeComponentsContents>(timeZoneField, knownZones) {
515тЖТ
516тЖТ    override val builderRepresentation: String
517тЖТ        get() =
518тЖТ            "${DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDateTimeComponents::timeZoneId.name}()"
519тЖТ
520тЖТ    override fun equals(other: Any?): Boolean = other is TimeZoneIdDirective && other.knownZones == knownZones
521тЖТ    override fun hashCode(): Int = knownZones.hashCode()
522тЖТ}
523тЖТ
524тЖТinternal class DateTimeComponentsFormat(override val actualFormat: CachedFormatStructure<DateTimeComponentsContents>) :
525тЖТ    AbstractDateTimeFormat<DateTimeComponents, DateTimeComponentsContents>() {
526тЖТ    override fun intermediateFromValue(value: DateTimeComponents): DateTimeComponentsContents = value.contents
527тЖТ
528тЖТ    override fun valueFromIntermediate(intermediate: DateTimeComponentsContents): DateTimeComponents =
529тЖТ        DateTimeComponents(intermediate)
530тЖТ
531тЖТ    override val emptyIntermediate get() = emptyDateTimeComponentsContents
532тЖТ
533тЖТ    class Builder(override val actualBuilder: AppendableFormatStructure<DateTimeComponentsContents>) :
534тЖТ        AbstractDateTimeFormatBuilder<DateTimeComponentsContents, Builder>, AbstractWithDateTimeBuilder,
535тЖТ        AbstractWithOffsetBuilder, DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDateTimeComponents {
536тЖТ        override fun addFormatStructureForDateTime(structure: FormatStructure<DateTimeFieldContainer>) {
537тЖТ            actualBuilder.add(structure)
538тЖТ        }
539тЖТ
540тЖТ        override fun addFormatStructureForOffset(structure: FormatStructure<UtcOffsetFieldContainer>) {
541тЖТ            actualBuilder.add(structure)
542тЖТ        }
543тЖТ
544тЖТ        override fun timeZoneId() =
545тЖТ            actualBuilder.add(BasicFormatStructure(TimeZoneIdDirective(TimeZone.availableZoneIds)))
546тЖТ
547тЖТ        @Suppress("NO_ELSE_IN_WHEN")
548тЖТ        override fun dateTimeComponents(format: DateTimeFormat<DateTimeComponents>) = when (format) {
549тЖТ            is DateTimeComponentsFormat -> actualBuilder.add(format.actualFormat)
550тЖТ        }
551тЖТ
552тЖТ        override fun createEmpty(): Builder = Builder(AppendableFormatStructure())
553тЖТ    }
554тЖТ}
555тЖТ
556тЖТprivate class TwoDigitNumber(private val reference: KMutableProperty0<Int?>) {
557тЖТ    operator fun getValue(thisRef: Any?, property: KProperty<*>) = reference.getValue(thisRef, property)
558тЖТ
559тЖТ    operator fun setValue(thisRef: Any?, property: KProperty<*>, value: Int?) {
560тЖТ        require(value === null || value in 0..99) { "${property.name} must be a two-digit number, got '$value'" }
561тЖТ        reference.setValue(thisRef, property, value)
562тЖТ    }
563тЖТ}
564тЖТ
565тЖТprivate val emptyDateTimeComponentsContents = DateTimeComponentsContents()
566тЖТ

conversation_history.content:
1тЖТ/*
  2тЖТ * Copyright 2023 JetBrains s.r.o. and contributors.
  3тЖТ * Use of this source code is governed by the Apache 2.0 License that can be found in the LICENSE.txt file.
  4тЖТ */
  5тЖТ
  6тЖТpackage kotlinx.datetime.internal.format.parser
  7тЖТ
  8тЖТinternal interface ParserOperation<in Output> {
  9тЖТ    fun consume(storage: Output, input: CharSequence, startIndex: Int): ParseResult
 10тЖТ}
 11тЖТ
 12тЖТ/**
 13тЖТ * Consumes exactly the string [string].
 14тЖТ */
 15тЖТinternal class PlainStringParserOperation<Output>(val string: String) : ParserOperation<Output> {
 16тЖТ    init {
 17тЖТ        require(string.isNotEmpty()) { "Empty string is not allowed" }
 18тЖТ        require(!string[0].isDigit()) { "String '$string' starts with a digit" }
 19тЖТ        require(!string[string.length - 1].isDigit()) { "String '$string' ends with a digit" }
 20тЖТ    }
 21тЖТ
 22тЖТ    override fun consume(storage: Output, input: CharSequence, startIndex: Int): ParseResult {
 23тЖТ        if (startIndex + string.length > input.length)
 24тЖТ            return ParseResult.Error(startIndex) { "Unexpected end of input: yet to parse '$string'" }
 25тЖТ        for (i in string.indices) {
 26тЖТ            if (input[startIndex + i] != string[i]) return ParseResult.Error(startIndex) {
 27тЖТ                "Expected $string but got ${input.substring(startIndex, startIndex + i + 1)}"
 28тЖТ            }
 29тЖТ        }
 30тЖТ        return ParseResult.Ok(startIndex + string.length)
 31тЖТ    }
 32тЖТ
 33тЖТ    // TODO: properly escape
 34тЖТ    override fun toString(): String = "'$string'"
 35тЖТ}
 36тЖТ
 37тЖТ/**
 38тЖТ * Greedily consumes as many digits as possible and redistributes them among [consumers].
 39тЖТ *
 40тЖТ * At most one consumer is allowed to have a variable length.
 41тЖТ * If more digits are supplied than the sum of lengths of all consumers, this is the consumer that will receive the
 42тЖТ * extra.
 43тЖТ */
 44тЖТinternal class NumberSpanParserOperation<Output>(
 45тЖТ    val consumers: List<NumberConsumer<Output>>,
 46тЖТ) : ParserOperation<Output> {
 47тЖТ
 48тЖТ    private val minLength = consumers.sumOf { it.length ?: 1 }
 49тЖТ    private val isFlexible = consumers.any { it.length == null }
 50тЖТ
 51тЖТ    init {
 52тЖТ        require(consumers.all { (it.length ?: Int.MAX_VALUE) > 0 })
 53тЖТ        require(consumers.count { it.length == null } <= 1)
 54тЖТ    }
 55тЖТ
 56тЖТ    private val whatThisExpects: String
 57тЖТ        get() {
 58тЖТ            val consumerLengths = consumers.map {
 59тЖТ                when (val length = it.length) {
 60тЖТ                    null -> "at least one digit"
 61тЖТ                    else -> "$length digits"
 62тЖТ                } + " for ${it.whatThisExpects}"
 63тЖТ            }
 64тЖТ            return if (isFlexible) {
 65тЖТ                "a number with at least $minLength digits: $consumerLengths"
 66тЖТ            } else {
 67тЖТ                "a number with exactly $minLength digits: $consumerLengths"
 68тЖТ            }
 69тЖТ        }
 70тЖТ
 71тЖТ    override fun consume(storage: Output, input: CharSequence, startIndex: Int): ParseResult {
 72тЖТ        if (startIndex + minLength > input.length)
 73тЖТ            return ParseResult.Error(startIndex) { "Unexpected end of input: yet to parse $whatThisExpects" }
 74тЖТ        var digitsInRow = 0
 75тЖТ        while (startIndex + digitsInRow < input.length && input[startIndex + digitsInRow].isDigit()) {
 76тЖТ            ++digitsInRow
 77тЖТ        }
 78тЖТ        if (digitsInRow < minLength)
 79тЖТ            return ParseResult.Error(startIndex) {
 80тЖТ                "Only found $digitsInRow digits in a row, but need to parse $whatThisExpects"
 81тЖТ            }
 82тЖТ        var index = startIndex
 83тЖТ        for (i in consumers.indices) {
 84тЖТ            val length = consumers[i].length ?: (digitsInRow - minLength + 1)
 85тЖТ            val numberString = input.substring(index, index + length)
 86тЖТ            val error = consumers[i].consume(storage, numberString)
 87тЖТ            if (error != null) {
 88тЖТ                return ParseResult.Error(index) {
 89тЖТ                    "Can not interpret the string '$numberString' as ${consumers[i].whatThisExpects}: ${error.errorMessage()}"
 90тЖТ                }
 91тЖТ            }
 92тЖТ            index += length
 93тЖТ        }
 94тЖТ        return ParseResult.Ok(index)
 95тЖТ    }
 96тЖТ
 97тЖТ    override fun toString(): String = whatThisExpects
 98тЖТ}
 99тЖТ
100тЖТinternal class SignParser<Output>(
101тЖТ    private val isNegativeSetter: (Output, Boolean) -> Unit,
102тЖТ    private val withPlusSign: Boolean,
103тЖТ    private val whatThisExpects: String,
104тЖТ) : ParserOperation<Output> {
105тЖТ    override fun consume(storage: Output, input: CharSequence, startIndex: Int): ParseResult {
106тЖТ        if (startIndex >= input.length)
107тЖТ            return ParseResult.Ok(startIndex)
108тЖТ        val char = input[startIndex]
109тЖТ        if (char == '-') {
110тЖТ            isNegativeSetter(storage, true)
111тЖТ            return ParseResult.Ok(startIndex + 1)
112тЖТ        }
113тЖТ        if (char == '+' && withPlusSign) {
114тЖТ            isNegativeSetter(storage, false)
115тЖТ            return ParseResult.Ok(startIndex + 1)
116тЖТ        }
117тЖТ        return ParseResult.Error(startIndex) { "Expected $whatThisExpects but got $char" }
118тЖТ    }
119тЖТ
120тЖТ    override fun toString(): String = whatThisExpects
121тЖТ}
122тЖТ
123тЖТ/**
124тЖТ * Consumes an empty string and unconditionally modifies the accumulator.
125тЖТ */
126тЖТinternal class UnconditionalModification<Output>(
127тЖТ    private val operation: (Output) -> Unit
128тЖТ) : ParserOperation<Output> {
129тЖТ    override fun consume(storage: Output, input: CharSequence, startIndex: Int): ParseResult {
130тЖТ        operation(storage)
131тЖТ        return ParseResult.Ok(startIndex)
132тЖТ    }
133тЖТ}
134тЖТ
135тЖТ/**
136тЖТ * Matches the longest suitable string from `strings` and calls [consume] with the matched string.
137тЖТ */
138тЖТinternal class StringSetParserOperation<Output>(
139тЖТ    strings: Collection<String>,
140тЖТ    private val setter: AssignableField<Output, String>,
141тЖТ    private val whatThisExpects: String,
142тЖТ) : ParserOperation<Output> {
143тЖТ
144тЖТ    // TODO: tries don't have good performance characteristics for small sets, add a special case for small sets
145тЖТ
146тЖТ    private class TrieNode(
147тЖТ        val children: MutableList<Pair<String, TrieNode>> = mutableListOf(),
148тЖТ        var isTerminal: Boolean = false
149тЖТ    )
150тЖТ
151тЖТ    private val trie = TrieNode()
152тЖТ
153тЖТ    init {
154тЖТ        for (string in strings) {
155тЖТ            var node = trie
156тЖТ            for (char in string) {
157тЖТ                val searchResult = node.children.binarySearchBy(char.toString()) { it.first }
158тЖТ                node = if (searchResult < 0) {
159тЖТ                    TrieNode().also { node.children.add(-searchResult - 1, char.toString() to it) }
160тЖТ                } else {
161тЖТ                    node.children[searchResult].second
162тЖТ                }
163тЖТ            }
164тЖТ            node.isTerminal = true
165тЖТ        }
166тЖТ        fun reduceTrie(trie: TrieNode) {
167тЖТ            for ((_, child) in trie.children) {
168тЖТ                reduceTrie(child)
169тЖТ            }
170тЖТ            val newChildren = mutableListOf<Pair<String, TrieNode>>()
171тЖТ            for ((key, child) in trie.children) {
172тЖТ                if (!child.isTerminal && child.children.size == 1) {
173тЖТ                    val (grandChildKey, grandChild) = child.children.single()
174тЖТ                    newChildren.add(key + grandChildKey to grandChild)
175тЖТ                } else {
176тЖТ                    newChildren.add(key to child)
177тЖТ                }
178тЖТ            }
179тЖТ            trie.children.clear()
180тЖТ            trie.children.addAll(newChildren.sortedBy { it.first })
181тЖТ        }
182тЖТ        reduceTrie(trie)
183тЖТ    }
184тЖТ
185тЖТ    override fun consume(storage: Output, input: CharSequence, startIndex: Int): ParseResult {
186тЖТ        var node = trie
187тЖТ        var index = startIndex
188тЖТ        var lastMatch: Int? = null
189тЖТ        loop@ while (index <= input.length) {
190тЖТ            if (node.isTerminal) lastMatch = index
191тЖТ            for ((key, child) in node.children) {
192тЖТ                if (input.startsWith(key, index)) {
193тЖТ                    node = child
194тЖТ                    index += key.length
195тЖТ                    continue@loop
196тЖТ                }
197тЖТ            }
198тЖТ            break // nothing found
199тЖТ        }
200тЖТ        return if (lastMatch != null) {
201тЖТ            setter.setWithoutReassigning(storage, input.substring(startIndex, lastMatch), startIndex, lastMatch)
202тЖТ        } else {
203тЖТ            ParseResult.Error(startIndex) { "Expected $whatThisExpects but got ${input.substring(startIndex, index)}" }
204тЖТ        }
205тЖТ    }
206тЖТ}
207тЖТ
208тЖТinternal fun <Output> SignedIntParser(
209тЖТ    minDigits: Int?,
210тЖТ    maxDigits: Int?,
211тЖТ    spacePadding: Int?,
212тЖТ    setter: AssignableField<Output, Int>,
213тЖТ    name: String,
214тЖТ    plusOnExceedsWidth: Int?,
215тЖТ): ParserStructure<Output> {
216тЖТ    val parsers = mutableListOf(
217тЖТ        spaceAndZeroPaddedUnsignedInt(minDigits, maxDigits, spacePadding, setter, name, withMinus = true)
218тЖТ    )
219тЖТ    if (plusOnExceedsWidth != null) {
220тЖТ        parsers.add(
221тЖТ            spaceAndZeroPaddedUnsignedInt(minDigits, plusOnExceedsWidth, spacePadding, setter, name)
222тЖТ        )
223тЖТ        parsers.add(
224тЖТ            ParserStructure(
225тЖТ                listOf(
226тЖТ                    PlainStringParserOperation("+"),
227тЖТ                    NumberSpanParserOperation(
228тЖТ                        listOf(
229тЖТ                            UnsignedIntConsumer(
230тЖТ                                plusOnExceedsWidth + 1,
231тЖТ                                maxDigits,
232тЖТ                                setter,
233тЖТ                                name,
234тЖТ                                multiplyByMinus1 = false
235тЖТ                            )
236тЖТ                        )
237тЖТ                    )
238тЖТ                ),
239тЖТ                emptyList()
240тЖТ            )
241тЖТ        )
242тЖТ    } else {
243тЖТ        parsers.add(
244тЖТ            spaceAndZeroPaddedUnsignedInt(minDigits, maxDigits, spacePadding, setter, name)
245тЖТ        )
246тЖТ    }
247тЖТ    return ParserStructure(
248тЖТ        emptyList(),
249тЖТ        parsers,
250тЖТ    )
251тЖТ}
252тЖТ
253тЖТ// With maxWidth = 4,
254тЖТ// padWidth = 7: "   " + (four digits | " " (three digits | " " (two digits | " ", one digit)))
255тЖТ// padWidth = 3: three to four digits | " " (two digits | " ", one digit)
256тЖТinternal fun <Target> spaceAndZeroPaddedUnsignedInt(
257тЖТ    minDigits: Int?,
258тЖТ    maxDigits: Int?,
259тЖТ    spacePadding: Int?,
260тЖТ    setter: AssignableField<Target, Int>,
261тЖТ    name: String,
262тЖТ    withMinus: Boolean = false,
263тЖТ): ParserStructure<Target> {
264тЖТ    val minNumberLength = (minDigits ?: 1) + if (withMinus) 1 else 0
265тЖТ    val maxNumberLength = maxDigits?.let { if (withMinus) it + 1 else it } ?: Int.MAX_VALUE
266тЖТ    val spacePadding = spacePadding ?: 0
267тЖТ    fun numberOfRequiredLengths(minNumberLength: Int, maxNumberLength: Int): ParserStructure<Target> {
268тЖТ        check(maxNumberLength >= 1 + if (withMinus) 1 else 0)
269тЖТ        return ParserStructure(
270тЖТ            buildList {
271тЖТ                if (withMinus) add(PlainStringParserOperation("-"))
272тЖТ                add(
273тЖТ                    NumberSpanParserOperation(
274тЖТ                        listOf(
275тЖТ                            UnsignedIntConsumer(
276тЖТ                                minNumberLength - if (withMinus) 1 else 0,
277тЖТ                                maxNumberLength - if (withMinus) 1 else 0,
278тЖТ                                setter,
279тЖТ                                name,
280тЖТ                                multiplyByMinus1 = withMinus,
281тЖТ                            )
282тЖТ                        )
283тЖТ                    )
284тЖТ                )
285тЖТ            },
286тЖТ            emptyList()
287тЖТ        )
288тЖТ    }
289тЖТ
290тЖТ    val maxPaddedNumberLength = minOf(maxNumberLength, spacePadding)
291тЖТ    if (minNumberLength >= maxPaddedNumberLength) return numberOfRequiredLengths(minNumberLength, maxNumberLength)
292тЖТ    // invariant: the length of the string parsed by 'accumulated' is exactly 'accumulatedWidth'
293тЖТ    var accumulated: ParserStructure<Target> = numberOfRequiredLengths(minNumberLength, minNumberLength)
294тЖТ    for (accumulatedWidth in minNumberLength until maxPaddedNumberLength) {
295тЖТ        accumulated = ParserStructure(
296тЖТ            emptyList(),
297тЖТ            listOf(
298тЖТ                numberOfRequiredLengths(accumulatedWidth + 1, accumulatedWidth + 1),
299тЖТ                listOf(
300тЖТ                    ParserStructure(listOf(PlainStringParserOperation(" ")), emptyList()),
301тЖТ                    accumulated
302тЖТ                ).concat()
303тЖТ            )
304тЖТ        )
305тЖТ    }
306тЖТ    // accumulatedWidth == maxNumberLength || accumulatedWidth == spacePadding.
307тЖТ    // In the first case, we're done, in the second case, we need to add the remaining numeric lengths.
308тЖТ    return if (spacePadding > maxNumberLength) {
309тЖТ        val prepadding = PlainStringParserOperation<Target>(" ".repeat(spacePadding - maxNumberLength))
310тЖТ        listOf(
311тЖТ            ParserStructure(
312тЖТ                listOf(
313тЖТ                    prepadding,
314тЖТ                ),
315тЖТ                emptyList()
316тЖТ            ), accumulated
317тЖТ        ).concat()
318тЖТ    } else if (spacePadding == maxNumberLength) {
319тЖТ        accumulated
320тЖТ    } else {
321тЖТ        val r = ParserStructure(
322тЖТ            emptyList(),
323тЖТ            listOf(
324тЖТ                numberOfRequiredLengths(spacePadding + 1, maxNumberLength),
325тЖТ                accumulated
326тЖТ            )
327тЖТ        )
328тЖТ        r
329тЖТ    }
330тЖТ}
331тЖТ
332тЖТinternal fun <Output> ReducedIntParser(
333тЖТ    digits: Int,
334тЖТ    base: Int,
335тЖТ    setter: AssignableField<Output, Int>,
336тЖТ    name: String,
337тЖТ): ParserStructure<Output> = ParserStructure(
338тЖТ    emptyList(),
339тЖТ    listOf(
340тЖТ        ParserStructure(
341тЖТ            listOf(
342тЖТ                NumberSpanParserOperation(
343тЖТ                    listOf(
344тЖТ                        ReducedIntConsumer(
345тЖТ                            digits,
346тЖТ                            setter,
347тЖТ                            name,
348тЖТ                            base = base
349тЖТ                        )
350тЖТ                    )
351тЖТ                )
352тЖТ            ),
353тЖТ            emptyList()
354тЖТ        ),
355тЖТ        ParserStructure(
356тЖТ            listOf(
357тЖТ                PlainStringParserOperation("+"),
358тЖТ                NumberSpanParserOperation(
359тЖТ                    listOf(
360тЖТ                        UnsignedIntConsumer(
361тЖТ                            null,
362тЖТ                            null,
363тЖТ                            setter,
364тЖТ                            name,
365тЖТ                            multiplyByMinus1 = false
366тЖТ                        )
367тЖТ                    )
368тЖТ                )
369тЖТ            ),
370тЖТ            emptyList()
371тЖТ        ),
372тЖТ        ParserStructure(
373тЖТ            listOf(
374тЖТ                PlainStringParserOperation("-"),
375тЖТ                NumberSpanParserOperation(
376тЖТ                    listOf(
377тЖТ                        UnsignedIntConsumer(
378тЖТ                            null,
379тЖТ                            null,
380тЖТ                            setter,
381тЖТ                            name,
382тЖТ                            multiplyByMinus1 = true
383тЖТ                        )
384тЖТ                    )
385тЖТ                )
386тЖТ            ),
387тЖТ            emptyList()
388тЖТ        ),
389тЖТ    )
390тЖТ)

392тЖТinternal interface AssignableField<in Object, Type> {
393тЖТ    /**
394тЖТ     * If the field is not set, sets it to the given value.
395тЖТ     * If the field is set to the given value, does nothing.
396тЖТ     * If the field is set to a different value, throws [IllegalArgumentException].
397тЖТ     *
398тЖТ     * This function is used to ensure internal consistency during parsing.
399тЖТ     * There exist formats where the same data is repeated several times in the same object, for example,
400тЖТ     * "14:15 (02:15 PM)". In such cases, we want to ensure that the values are consistent.
401тЖТ     */
402тЖТ    fun trySetWithoutReassigning(container: Object, newValue: Type): Type?
403тЖТ
404тЖТ    /**
405тЖТ     * The name of the field.
406тЖТ     */
407тЖТ    val name: String
408тЖТ}
409тЖТ
410тЖТprivate fun <Object, Type> AssignableField<Object, Type>.setWithoutReassigning(
411тЖТ    receiver: Object,
412тЖТ    value: Type,
413тЖТ    position: Int,
414тЖТ    nextIndex: Int
415тЖТ): ParseResult {
416тЖТ    val conflictingValue = trySetWithoutReassigning(receiver, value)
417тЖТ    return if (conflictingValue === null) {
418тЖТ        ParseResult.Ok(nextIndex)
419тЖТ    } else {
420тЖТ        ParseResult.Error(position) {
421тЖТ            "Attempting to assign conflicting values '$conflictingValue' and '$value' to field '$name'"
422тЖТ        }
423тЖТ    }
424тЖТ}

215тЖТinternal class FractionalSecondDirective(
216тЖТ    private val minDigits: Int,
217тЖТ    private val maxDigits: Int,
218тЖТ    zerosToAdd: List<Int> = NO_EXTRA_ZEROS,
219тЖТ) :
220тЖТ    DecimalFractionFieldFormatDirective<TimeFieldContainer>(
221тЖТ        TimeFields.fractionOfSecond,
222тЖТ        minDigits,
223тЖТ        maxDigits,
224тЖТ        zerosToAdd
225тЖТ    ) {
226тЖТ
227тЖТ    override val builderRepresentation: String
228тЖТ        get() {
229тЖТ            val ref = "secondFraction" // can't directly reference `secondFraction` due to resolution ambiguity
230тЖТ            // we ignore `grouping`, as it's not representable in the end users' code
231тЖТ            return when {
232тЖТ                minDigits == 1 && maxDigits == 9 -> "$ref()"
233тЖТ                minDigits == 1 -> "$ref(maxLength = $maxDigits)"
234тЖТ                maxDigits == 1 -> "$ref(minLength = $minDigits)"
235тЖТ                maxDigits == minDigits -> "$ref($minDigits)"
236тЖТ                else -> "$ref($minDigits, $maxDigits)"
237тЖТ            }
238тЖТ        }
239тЖТ
240тЖТ    override fun equals(other: Any?): Boolean =
241тЖТ        other is FractionalSecondDirective && minDigits == other.minDigits && maxDigits == other.maxDigits

245тЖТ    companion object {

247тЖТ        val GROUP_BY_THREE = listOf(2, 1, 0, 2, 1, 0, 2, 1, 0)

 10тЖТimport kotlinx.datetime.internal.format.parser.*
 11тЖТ
 12тЖТ/**
 13тЖТ * A format for parsing and formatting date-time-related values.
 14тЖТ */
 15тЖТpublic sealed interface DateTimeFormat<T> {
 16тЖТ    /**
 17тЖТ     * Formats the given [value] into a string, using this format.
 18тЖТ     */
 19тЖТ    public fun format(value: T): String
 20тЖТ
 21тЖТ    /**
 22тЖТ     * Formats the given [value] into the given [appendable] using this format.
 23тЖТ     */
 24тЖТ    public fun <A : Appendable> formatTo(appendable: A, value: T): A
 25тЖТ
 26тЖТ    /**
 27тЖТ     * Parses the given [input] string as [T] using this format.
 28тЖТ     *
 29тЖТ     * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the input string is not in the expected format or the value is invalid.
 30тЖТ     */
 31тЖТ    public fun parse(input: CharSequence): T
 32тЖТ
 33тЖТ    /**
 34тЖТ     * Parses the given [input] string as [T] using this format.
 35тЖТ     *
 36тЖТ     * @return the parsed value, or `null` if the input string is not in the expected format or the value is invalid.
 37тЖТ     */
 38тЖТ    public fun parseOrNull(input: CharSequence): T?
 39тЖТ
 40тЖТ    public companion object {
 41тЖТ        /**
 42тЖТ         * Produces Kotlin code that, when pasted into a Kotlin source file, creates a [DateTimeFormat] instance that
 43тЖТ         * behaves identically to [format].
 44тЖТ         *
 45тЖТ         * The typical use case for this is to create a [DateTimeFormat] instance using a non-idiomatic approach and
 46тЖТ         * then convert it to a builder DSL.
 47тЖТ         */
 48тЖТ        public fun formatAsKotlinBuilderDsl(format: DateTimeFormat<*>): String = when (format) {
 49тЖТ            is AbstractDateTimeFormat<*, *> -> format.actualFormat.builderString(allFormatConstants)
 50тЖТ        }
 51тЖТ    }
 52тЖТ}
 53тЖТ
 54тЖТ/**
 55тЖТ * The style of padding to use when formatting a value.
 56тЖТ */
 57тЖТpublic enum class Padding {
 58тЖТ    /**
 59тЖТ     * No padding.
 60тЖТ     */
 61тЖТ    NONE,
 62тЖТ
 63тЖТ    /**
 64тЖТ     * Pad with zeros.
 65тЖТ     */
 66тЖТ    ZERO,
 67тЖТ
 68тЖТ    /**
 69тЖТ     * Pad with spaces.
 70тЖТ     */
 71тЖТ    SPACE
 72тЖТ}
 73тЖТ
 74тЖТinternal fun Padding.toKotlinCode(): String = when (this) {
 75тЖТ    Padding.NONE -> "Padding.NONE"
 76тЖТ    Padding.ZERO -> "Padding.ZERO"
 77тЖТ    Padding.SPACE -> "Padding.SPACE"
 78тЖТ}
 79тЖТ
 80тЖТinternal inline fun Padding.minDigits(width: Int) = if (this == Padding.ZERO) width else 1
 81тЖТinternal inline fun Padding.spaces(width: Int) = if (this == Padding.SPACE) width else null
 82тЖТ
 83тЖТ/** [T] is the user-visible type, whereas [U] is its mutable representation for parsing and formatting. */
 84тЖТinternal sealed class AbstractDateTimeFormat<T, U : Copyable<U>> : DateTimeFormat<T> {
 85тЖТ
 86тЖТ    abstract val actualFormat: CachedFormatStructure<U>
 87тЖТ
 88тЖТ    abstract fun intermediateFromValue(value: T): U
 89тЖТ
 90тЖТ    abstract fun valueFromIntermediate(intermediate: U): T
 91тЖТ
 92тЖТ    abstract val emptyIntermediate: U // should be part of the `Copyable` interface once the language allows this
 93тЖТ
 94тЖТ    open fun valueFromIntermediateOrNull(intermediate: U): T? = try {
 95тЖТ        valueFromIntermediate(intermediate)
 96тЖТ    } catch (e: IllegalArgumentException) {
 97тЖТ        null
 98тЖТ    }
 99тЖТ
100тЖТ    override fun format(value: T): String = StringBuilder().also {
101тЖТ        actualFormat.formatter().format(intermediateFromValue(value), it)
102тЖТ    }.toString()
103тЖТ
104тЖТ    override fun <A : Appendable> formatTo(appendable: A, value: T): A = appendable.apply {
105тЖТ        actualFormat.formatter().format(intermediateFromValue(value), this)
106тЖТ    }
107тЖТ
108тЖТ    override fun parse(input: CharSequence): T {
109тЖТ        val matched = try {
110тЖТ            // without the fully qualified name, the compilation fails for some reason
111тЖТ            Parser(actualFormat.parser()).match(input, emptyIntermediate)
112тЖТ        } catch (e: ParseException) {
113тЖТ            throw DateTimeFormatException("Failed to parse value from '$input'", e)
114тЖТ        }
115тЖТ        try {
116тЖТ            return valueFromIntermediate(matched)
117тЖТ        } catch (e: IllegalArgumentException) {
118тЖТ            throw DateTimeFormatException(e.message!!)
119тЖТ        }
120тЖТ    }
121тЖТ
122тЖТ    override fun parseOrNull(input: CharSequence): T? =
123тЖТ        // without the fully qualified name, the compilation fails for some reason
124тЖТ        Parser(actualFormat.parser()).matchOrNull(input, emptyIntermediate)?.let { valueFromIntermediateOrNull(it) }
125тЖТ
126тЖТ}
127тЖТ
128тЖТprivate val allFormatConstants: List<Pair<String, CachedFormatStructure<*>>> by lazy {
129тЖТ    fun unwrap(format: DateTimeFormat<*>): CachedFormatStructure<*> = (format as AbstractDateTimeFormat<*, *>).actualFormat
130тЖТ    // the formats are ordered vaguely by decreasing length, as the topmost among suitable ones is chosen.
131тЖТ    listOf(
132тЖТ        "${DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDateTimeComponents::dateTimeComponents.name}(DateTimeComponents.Formats.RFC_1123)" to
133тЖТ            unwrap(DateTimeComponents.Formats.RFC_1123),
134тЖТ        "${DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDateTimeComponents::dateTimeComponents.name}(DateTimeComponents.Formats.ISO_DATE_TIME_OFFSET)" to
135тЖТ            unwrap(DateTimeComponents.Formats.ISO_DATE_TIME_OFFSET),
136тЖТ        "${DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDateTime::date.name}(LocalDateTime.Formats.ISO)" to unwrap(LocalDateTime.Formats.ISO),
137тЖТ        "${DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate::date.name}(LocalDate.Formats.ISO)" to unwrap(LocalDate.Formats.ISO),
138тЖТ        "${DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate::date.name}(LocalDate.Formats.ISO_BASIC)" to unwrap(LocalDate.Formats.ISO_BASIC),
139тЖТ        "${DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithTime::time.name}(LocalTime.Formats.ISO)" to unwrap(LocalTime.Formats.ISO),
140тЖТ        "${DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithUtcOffset::offset.name}(UtcOffset.Formats.ISO)" to unwrap(UtcOffset.Formats.ISO),
141тЖТ        "${DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithUtcOffset::offset.name}(UtcOffset.Formats.ISO_BASIC)" to unwrap(UtcOffset.Formats.ISO_BASIC),
142тЖТ        "${DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithUtcOffset::offset.name}(UtcOffset.Formats.FOUR_DIGITS)" to unwrap(UtcOffset.Formats.FOUR_DIGITS),
143тЖТ    )
144тЖТ}

265тЖТ * - exactly zero if this date is equal to the other.
266тЖТ *
267тЖТ * @throws DateTimeArithmeticException if the number of months between the two dates exceeds an Int (JVM only).
268тЖТ *

271тЖТpublic operator fun LocalDate.minus(other: LocalDate): DatePeriod = other.periodUntil(this)

273тЖТ/**
274тЖТ * Returns the whole number of the specified date [units][unit] between `this` and [other] dates.
275тЖТ *

1тЖТ/*

  3тЖТ * Use of this source code is governed by the Apache 2.0 License that can be found in the LICENSE.txt file.
  4тЖТ */
  5тЖТ
  6тЖТpackage kotlinx.datetime
  7тЖТ
  8тЖТimport kotlinx.datetime.LocalDate.Companion.parse
  9тЖТimport kotlinx.datetime.format.*
 10тЖТimport kotlinx.datetime.serializers.LocalTimeIso8601Serializer
 11тЖТimport kotlinx.serialization.Serializable
 12тЖТ
 13тЖТ
 14тЖТ/**
 15тЖТ * The time part of [LocalDateTime].
 16тЖТ *
 17тЖТ * This class represents time-of-day without a referencing a specific date.
 18тЖТ * To reconstruct a full [LocalDateTime], representing civil date and time, [LocalTime] needs to be
 19тЖТ * combined with [LocalDate] via [LocalDate.atTime] or [LocalTime.atDate].
 20тЖТ *
 21тЖТ * Also, [LocalTime] does not reference a particular time zone.
 22тЖТ * Therefore, even on the same date, [LocalTime] denotes different moments of time.
 23тЖТ * For example, `18:43` happens at different moments in Berlin and in Tokyo.
 24тЖТ *
 25тЖТ * The arithmetic on [LocalTime] values is not provided, since without accounting for the time zone
 26тЖТ * transitions it may give misleading results.
 27тЖТ */
 28тЖТ@Serializable(LocalTimeIso8601Serializer::class)
 29тЖТpublic expect class LocalTime : Comparable<LocalTime> {
 30тЖТ    public companion object {
 31тЖТ
 32тЖТ        /**
 33тЖТ         * A shortcut for calling [DateTimeFormat.parse].
 34тЖТ         *
 35тЖТ         * Parses a string that represents time-of-day and returns the parsed [LocalTime] value.
 36тЖТ         *
 37тЖТ         * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the text cannot be parsed or the boundaries of [LocalTime] are
 38тЖТ         * exceeded.
 39тЖТ         *
 40тЖТ         * @see LocalTime.toString for formatting using the default format.
 41тЖТ         * @see LocalTime.format for formatting using a custom format.
 42тЖТ         */
 43тЖТ        public fun parse(input: CharSequence, format: DateTimeFormat<LocalTime> = getIsoTimeFormat()): LocalTime
 44тЖТ
 45тЖТ        /**
 46тЖТ         * Constructs a [LocalTime] that represents the specified number of seconds since the start of a calendar day.
 47тЖТ         * The fractional parts of the second will be zero.
 48тЖТ         *
 49тЖТ         * @throws IllegalArgumentException if [secondOfDay] is outside the `0 until 86400` range,
 50тЖТ         * with 86400 being the number of seconds in a calendar day.
 51тЖТ         *
 52тЖТ         * @see LocalTime.toSecondOfDay
 53тЖТ         * @see LocalTime.fromMillisecondOfDay
 54тЖТ         * @see LocalTime.fromNanosecondOfDay
 55тЖТ         */
 56тЖТ        public fun fromSecondOfDay(secondOfDay: Int): LocalTime
 57тЖТ
 58тЖТ        /**
 59тЖТ         * Constructs a [LocalTime] that represents the specified number of milliseconds since the start of
 60тЖТ         * a calendar day.
 61тЖТ         * The sub-millisecond parts of the `LocalTime` will be zero.
 62тЖТ         *
 63тЖТ         * @throws IllegalArgumentException if [millisecondOfDay] is outside the `0 until 86400 * 1_000` range,
 64тЖТ         * with 86400 being the number of seconds in a calendar day.
 65тЖТ         *
 66тЖТ         * @see LocalTime.fromSecondOfDay
 67тЖТ         * @see LocalTime.toMillisecondOfDay
 68тЖТ         * @see LocalTime.fromNanosecondOfDay
 69тЖТ         */
 70тЖТ        public fun fromMillisecondOfDay(millisecondOfDay: Int): LocalTime
 71тЖТ
 72тЖТ        /**
 73тЖТ         * Constructs a [LocalTime] that represents the specified number of nanoseconds since the start of
 74тЖТ         * a calendar day.
 75тЖТ         *
 76тЖТ         * @throws IllegalArgumentException if [nanosecondOfDay] is outside the `0 until 86400 * 1_000_000_000` range,
 77тЖТ         * with 86400 being the number of seconds in a calendar day.
 78тЖТ         *
 79тЖТ         * @see LocalTime.fromSecondOfDay
 80тЖТ         * @see LocalTime.fromMillisecondOfDay
 81тЖТ         * @see LocalTime.toNanosecondOfDay
 82тЖТ         */
 83тЖТ        public fun fromNanosecondOfDay(nanosecondOfDay: Long): LocalTime
 84тЖТ
 85тЖТ        /**
 86тЖТ         * Creates a new format for parsing and formatting [LocalTime] values.
 87тЖТ         *
 88тЖТ         * Example:
 89тЖТ         * ```
 90тЖТ         * LocalTime.Format {
 91тЖТ         *   hour(); char(':'); minute(); char(':'); second()
 92тЖТ         *   optional { char('.'); secondFraction() }
 93тЖТ         * }
 94тЖТ         * ```
 95тЖТ         *
 96тЖТ         * Only parsing and formatting of well-formed values is supported. If the input does not fit the boundaries
 97тЖТ         * (for example, [second] is 60), consider using [DateTimeComponents.Format] instead.
 98тЖТ         *
 99тЖТ         * There is a collection of predefined formats in [LocalTime.Formats].
100тЖТ         */
101тЖТ        @Suppress("FunctionName")
102тЖТ        public fun Format(builder: DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithTime.() -> Unit): DateTimeFormat<LocalTime>
103тЖТ
104тЖТ        internal val MIN: LocalTime
105тЖТ        internal val MAX: LocalTime
106тЖТ    }
107тЖТ
108тЖТ    /**
109тЖТ     * A collection of predefined formats for parsing and formatting [LocalDateTime] values.
110тЖТ     *
111тЖТ     * [LocalTime.Formats.ISO] is a popular predefined format.
112тЖТ     *
113тЖТ     * If predefined formats are not sufficient, use [LocalTime.Format] to create a custom
114тЖТ     * [kotlinx.datetime.format.DateTimeFormat] for [LocalTime] values.
115тЖТ     */
116тЖТ    public object Formats {
117тЖТ        /**
118тЖТ         * ISO 8601 extended format.
119тЖТ         *
120тЖТ         * Examples: `12:34`, `12:34:56`, `12:34:56.789`, `12:34:56.1234`.
121тЖТ         *
122тЖТ         * When formatting, seconds are always included, even if they are zero.
123тЖТ         * Fractional parts of the second are included if non-zero.
124тЖТ         *
125тЖТ         * Guaranteed to parse all strings that [LocalTime.toString] produces.
126тЖТ         */
127тЖТ        public val ISO: DateTimeFormat<LocalTime>
128тЖТ    }
129тЖТ
130тЖТ    /**
131тЖТ     * Constructs a [LocalTime] instance from the given time components.
132тЖТ     *
133тЖТ     * The supported ranges of components:
134тЖТ     * - [hour] `0..23`
135тЖТ     * - [minute] `0..59`
136тЖТ     * - [second] `0..59`
137тЖТ     * - [nanosecond] `0..999_999_999`
138тЖТ     *
139тЖТ     * @throws IllegalArgumentException if any parameter is out of range.
140тЖТ     */
141тЖТ    public constructor(hour: Int, minute: Int, second: Int = 0, nanosecond: Int = 0)
142тЖТ
143тЖТ    /** Returns the hour-of-day time component of this time value. */
144тЖТ    public val hour: Int
145тЖТ
146тЖТ    /** Returns the minute-of-hour time component of this time value. */
147тЖТ    public val minute: Int
148тЖТ
149тЖТ    /** Returns the second-of-minute time component of this time value. */
150тЖТ    public val second: Int
151тЖТ
152тЖТ    /** Returns the nanosecond-of-second time component of this time value. */
153тЖТ    public val nanosecond: Int
154тЖТ
155тЖТ    /** Returns the time as a second of a day, in `0 until 24 * 60 * 60`. */
156тЖТ    public fun toSecondOfDay(): Int
157тЖТ
158тЖТ    /** Returns the time as a millisecond of a day, in `0 until 24 * 60 * 60 * 1_000`. */
159тЖТ    public fun toMillisecondOfDay(): Int
160тЖТ
161тЖТ    /** Returns the time as a nanosecond of a day, in `0 until 24 * 60 * 60 * 1_000_000_000`. */
162тЖТ    public fun toNanosecondOfDay(): Long
163тЖТ
164тЖТ    /**
165тЖТ     * Compares `this` time value with the [other] time value.
166тЖТ     * Returns zero if this value is equal to the other, a negative number if this value occurs earlier
167тЖТ     * in the course of a typical day than the other, and a positive number if this value occurs
168тЖТ     * later in the course of a typical day than the other.
169тЖТ     *
170тЖТ     * Note that, on days when there is a time overlap (for example, due to the daylight saving time
171тЖТ     * transitions in autumn), a "lesser" wall-clock reading can, in fact, happen later than the
172тЖТ     * "greater" one.
173тЖТ     */
174тЖТ    public override operator fun compareTo(other: LocalTime): Int
175тЖТ
176тЖТ    /**
177тЖТ     * Converts this time value to the extended ISO-8601 string representation.
178тЖТ     *
179тЖТ     * For readability, if the time represents a round minute (without seconds or fractional seconds),
180тЖТ     * the string representation will not include seconds. Also, fractions of seconds will add trailing zeros to
181тЖТ     * the fractional part until the number of digits after the dot is a multiple of three.
182тЖТ     *
183тЖТ     * Examples of output:
184тЖТ     * - `18:43`
185тЖТ     * - `18:43:00`
186тЖТ     * - `18:43:00.500`
187тЖТ     * - `18:43:00.123456789`
188тЖТ     *
189тЖТ     * @see Formats.ISO for a very similar format. The difference is that [Formats.ISO] will always include seconds,
190тЖТ     * even if they are zero, and will not add trailing zeros to the fractional part of the second for readability.
191тЖТ     * @see parse for the dual operation: obtaining [LocalTime] from a string.
192тЖТ     * @see LocalTime.format for formatting using a custom format.
193тЖТ     */
194тЖТ    public override fun toString(): String
195тЖТ}
196тЖТ
197тЖТ/**
198тЖТ * Formats this value using the given [format].
199тЖТ * Equivalent to calling [DateTimeFormat.format] on [format] with `this`.
200тЖТ */
201тЖТpublic fun LocalTime.format(format: DateTimeFormat<LocalTime>): String = format.format(this)
202тЖТ
203тЖТ/**
204тЖТ * @suppress
205тЖТ */
206тЖТ@Deprecated("Removed to support more idiomatic code. See https://github.com/Kotlin/kotlinx-datetime/issues/339", ReplaceWith("LocalTime.parse(this)"), DeprecationLevel.WARNING)
207тЖТpublic fun String.toLocalTime(): LocalTime = LocalTime.parse(this)
208тЖТ
209тЖТ/**
210тЖТ * Combines this time's components with the specified date components into a [LocalDateTime] value.
211тЖТ */
212тЖТpublic fun LocalTime.atDate(year: Int, monthNumber: Int, dayOfMonth: Int = 0): LocalDateTime =
213тЖТ    LocalDateTime(year, monthNumber, dayOfMonth, hour, minute, second, nanosecond)
214тЖТ
215тЖТ/**
216тЖТ * Combines this time's components with the specified date components into a [LocalDateTime] value.
217тЖТ */
218тЖТpublic fun LocalTime.atDate(year: Int, month: Month, dayOfMonth: Int = 0): LocalDateTime =
219тЖТ    LocalDateTime(year, month, dayOfMonth, hour, minute, second, nanosecond)
220тЖТ
221тЖТ/**
222тЖТ * Combines this time's components with the specified [LocalDate] components into a [LocalDateTime] value.
223тЖТ */
224тЖТpublic fun LocalTime.atDate(date: LocalDate): LocalDateTime = LocalDateTime(date, this)
225тЖТ
226тЖТ// workaround for https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KT-65484
227тЖТinternal fun getIsoTimeFormat() = LocalTime.Formats.ISO
228тЖТ

1тЖТ/*
  2тЖТ * Copyright 2019-2023 JetBrains s.r.o. and contributors.
